notes: Escort contracts now vary: the deadline window ranges from a 🔴 Rush job to a 🟢 Relaxed run (1-5 cycles of slack), and the fee blends payload, distance, threat, guild rank, a rush premium for tight windows and a hidden market swing — so two similar postings can pay quite differently and the true reward/risk ratio isn't obvious. Delivering with cycles to spare adds a quiet promptness bonus, so prepping to cut threat trades against a faster, better-paid run.
